_publications._publicationTitle: Comparing 3D imaging devices for the measurement of cutaneous neurofibromas in patients with Neurofibromatosis Type 1.

_contextSnippet: Vectra H1 software was only able to render 3D models of 49 cNFs for measurement analysis, due to a technical failure
details: Software was unable to render 3D models for 9 out of 58 cNFs (15.5%) due to technical failure, limiting measurement analysis to 49 cNFs
